summary: High‑quality audience recording that fans deem the definitive version of this show.
review: The reviewer compares this tape to other copies and calls it the one they’ve been looking for, describing it as the best among the available audience recordings. Although they note a slight disappointment with the CD playback sound, the overall impression is strongly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: 5‑star rating and enthusiastic language indicate a very favorable view, but only one brief review limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Regarded as the best of the audience tapes; reviewer mentions minor CD‑transfer disappointment but overall finds the sound satisfactory.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on song selection or pacing were provided.
